inline_comments: Doctor check for shell completion. - If profile uses slow dynamic pattern: upgrade to cached version - If profile has completion but no cache: auto-generate cache and upgrade profile - If no completion at all: prompt to install (with user confirmation)
Profile uses slow dynamic pattern - upgrade to cached version
Upgrade profile to use cached file
Profile has completion but no cache - auto-fix
No completion at all - prompt to install
In non-interactive mode, just note that completion is not installed
Ensure completion cache exists. Used during setup/update to fix cases where profile has completion but no cache. This is a silent fix - no prompts.
